message:
feat(dashboard): add terminal session cleanup

Add Close methods for proper cleanup of terminal sessions:
- TerminalSession.Close() safely closes SSH session and client
- TerminalManager.CloseAllForTask() closes all sessions for a task

Both methods are idempotent and safe for concurrent use.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
